sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Varonis Systems, Inc. (VRNS) Shareholders
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has issued a deadline alert for shareholders of Varonis Systems, Inc. (VRNS) who suffered losses. The firm is urging investors to contact them by March 9, 2026, to participate as a lead plaintiff in a class action lawsuit alleging securities fraud. The lawsuit stems from Varonis's reported underperformance in Q3 2025, which led to a significant stock price drop and claims of misleading statements by the company.

feed.title: Picard Medical, Inc. (PMI) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announce a class action lawsuit opportunity for investors of Picard Medical, Inc. (PMI) who suffered losses. The lawsuit alleges that Picard was involved in a fraudulent stock promotion scheme with misinformation and impersonated financial professionals, leading to insiders dumping shares during a price inflation campaign. Investors who incurred losses between September 2, 2025, and October 31, 2025, have until April 3, 2026, to participate as lead plaintiffs.

feed.title: Equinix Nigeria And Japan Moves Test Market View On Valuation
feed.summary: Equinix is expanding its global footprint with a $100 million investment initiative in Nigeria's data center sector and a partnership with Trafficmind.com in Osaka, Japan. These strategic moves aim to capitalize on growing demand for data centers and interconnection in Africa and Asia-Pacific. While the stock has shown strong recent momentum and is trading about 6% below analyst targets and 30.3% below Simply Wall St's fair value estimate, investors should consider the company's high debt level as a potential risk.

feed.title: Form 424B2 JPMORGAN CHASE & CO
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has filed a Form 424B2 for Auto Callable Accelerated Barrier Notes linked to the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the S&P 500 Index, due February 16, 2029. These notes offer uncapped returns of 1.50 times any appreciation of the lesser performing index if not automatically called, and are designed for investors willing to forgo interest and accept principal loss risk. The notes are structured to be callable early if both indices are at or above their Call Value on the Review Date.

feed.title: Eastman Chemical Maintains Quarterly Dividend Amid Revenue Challenges
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical Company has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.84 per share, demonstrating its commitment to shareholder returns despite a 12.1% decline in revenue for Q4 2025. The company targets Q1 2026 EPS between $1.00 and $1.20, depending on demand stability in the specialty materials sector. The dividend will be paid on April 8, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 13, 2026.

feed.title: Vishay introduces ultra compact chip resistors for automotive use
feed.summary: Vishay Intertechnology has launched a new series of AEC-Q200 qualified thick film chip resistors in a compact 0201 case size, reducing PCB space by 50% for automotive, industrial, and telecom applications. Despite their small size, these resistors offer a 0.05 W power rating and a wide operating temperature range. This release follows Vishay's mixed Q4 2025 earnings and the introduction of new power inductors, showcasing the company's ongoing efforts in miniaturization and product innovation.

feed.title: Edison International’s SCE Trust VI Faces Financial Headwinds from Wildfire Liabilities
feed.summary: Edison International's SCE Trust VI is confronting significant financial challenges due to wildfire liabilities, even as the company prepares to release its full-year 2025 financial results. With market experts anticipating Q4 EPS between $1.42 and $1.47 and revenue around $4.57 billion, the utility is also managing substantial expenses through securitization efforts. The company faces a gross liability ranging from $1.5 billion to $3.7 billion from incidents like the Eaton fire, alongside operational hurdles such as community opposition to infrastructure upgrades.

feed.title: CoStar layoffs hit Richmond -- again
feed.summary: CoStar Group has conducted another round of layoffs at its downtown Richmond headquarters, specifically impacting workers on its Homes.com platform. This follows a previous round of layoffs in February 2025, which affected over 100 employees and was partly attributed to the adoption of artificial intelligence. The recent layoffs come shortly after CoStar announced the launch of "Homes.com AI," highlighting a new transformative home search experience.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Expands U.S. Footprint with more than $1 Billion Investment in Next Generation Cell Therapy Manufacturing Facility in Pennsylvania
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson announced a more than $1 billion investment in a new cell therapy manufacturing facility in Montgomery County, Pennsylvania. This investment is part of the company's $55 billion U.S. investment plan and aims to expand its manufacturing capacity for advanced medicines, creating over 500 biomanufacturing jobs and 4,000 construction jobs. The facility will utilize cutting-edge cell therapy technologies to support Johnson & Johnson's portfolio in cancer, immune-mediated, and neurological diseases.

feed.title: Uber Stocks Climb As Ride-Hailing Giant Pours $100 Million Into New Robotaxi Charging Hubs
feed.summary: Uber Technologies is investing over $100 million to build charging infrastructure for its autonomous fleet, aiming to scale its self-driving services. This initiative, focusing on high-speed charging in key markets like the Bay Area, Los Angeles, and Dallas, supports Uber's strategy to expand its robotaxi operations. The move follows Uber's strong Q4 2025 financial performance, which saw 20% revenue growth, although its adjusted EPS missed analyst estimates.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Urges Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) Stockholders with Large Losses to Contact the Firm for Information About Their Rights
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made misleading statements regarding its ability to manage inventory and mitigate effects from the termination of the Residential Clean Energy Credit, overstating its financial prospects. Shareholders with significant losses are encouraged to contact the firm by April 20, 2026, to potentially serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Increases Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) has announced a quarterly dividend increase of 1 cent, raising it to 80 cents per common share, payable on March 13 to shareholders of record as of March 2. The company, a leading provider of architectural paint, demonstrates strong financial health with robust profitability and growth, though its valuation ratios suggest the stock is trading near historical highs. Despite a leveraged balance sheet, Sherwin-Williams maintains adequate interest coverage and favorable analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Omnicom Group schedules call on 2025 earnings review
feed.summary: Omnicom Group has scheduled a conference call for today at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. The company anticipates providing detailed insights into its performance and strategic direction during this webcast. Interested parties can find access information on Omnicom Group's official website.

feed.title: WEX (WEX) Faces Activist Proxy Fight: Is Capital Allocation Undermining Its Competitive Narrative?
feed.summary: Activist investor Impactive Capital has initiated a proxy contest against WEX Inc., nominating four directors and critiquing the company's operating margins, corporate governance, and performance compared to its peer Corpay. This move scrutinizes WEX's capital allocation, including a recent US$1.88 billion share repurchase program, despite the company reporting higher quarterly earnings. The proxy fight adds a new layer of complexity to WEX's investment narrative, alongside existing product and market catalysts, potentially influencing management's focus and the company's long-term strategic direction.

feed.title: DD: Deutsche Bank Raises Price Target for DuPont to $58 | DD Sto
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has reiterated its "Buy" rating for DuPont de Nemours (DD) and significantly increased its price target from $46.00 to $58.00, representing a 26.09% jump. This positive outlook is supported by similar upgrades and maintained "Outperform" or "Overweight" ratings from several other major financial institutions in February 2026. While analysts foresee an average upside of 8.19% from the current price, GuruFocus' estimated fair value (GF Value) suggests a potential downside of 61.14%.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams raises quarterly dividend to 80c from 79c per share
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.80 per common share, up from $0.79. The dividend is payable on March 13 to shareholders of record on March 2. This news was initially reported by TheFly.

feed.title: Real estate students, professionals gather for UC/PNC Economic Outlook
feed.summary: The 32nd annual UC/PNC Economic Outlook event was held on February 13, bringing together over 350 attendees, including more than 70 real estate students, to discuss local, national, and international economic developments. Speakers Stuart Hoffman and Greg Valliere provided insights on economic forecasts and geopolitical impacts. The event was co-hosted by the UC Real Estate Center and PNC Bank, with thanks extended to their corporate partners.

feed.title: Shentel's Employee Volunteer Initiative Gives Back to Local Charities
feed.summary: Shenandoah Telecommunications Company (Shentel) announced that 114 employees volunteered over 572 hours in the past year, supporting charities focused on food and housing insecurity. Through initiatives like the Summer Backpack Program and The Big Give, Shentel and its employees donated over $48,000, including matching contributions, to local organizations across several states. This effort highlights Shentel's commitment to community service, empowering employees through paid volunteer time to make a meaningful local impact.

feed.title: Perion Network: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Perion Network Ltd. (PERI) reported a profit of $8 million in its fourth quarter, translating to adjusted earnings of 49 cents per share, surpassing analyst expectations for revenue. The digital media company posted revenues of $137.1 million, beating the Zacks forecast of $136.7 million. For the entire year, Perion Network recorded a loss of $7.9 million on revenues of $439.9 million.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Discusses Gartner (IT) Stock
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed Gartner (IT) stock, noting the company's shares dropped significantly after a major selloff. Analysts at Truist and BMO Capital cut their price targets, citing a difficult market environment and contract churn. While concerns about AI's impact exist, Baron Partners Fund believes Gartner's proprietary data and insights will accelerate future contracts and are well-insulated from AI displacement.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams declares dividend of $0.80 per share
feed.summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per share. This dividend is payable on March 13 to shareholders of record as of March 2. This announcement follows closely on the heels of the company raising its dividend by 1.3%.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Urges Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) Stockholders with Large Losses to Contact the Firm for Information About Their Rights
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made false and misleading statements regarding its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate the impact of the Residential Clean Energy Credit termination. Shareholders who suffered losses are urged to contact the firm by April 20, 2026, to discuss potentially serving as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper Q4 Earnings Approaching: Will It Surprise Investors?
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) is set to release its Q4 2025 earnings, with expectations of revenue growth to $4.36 billion and EPS up 1.7% to 59 cents. While strong brand performance, pricing actions, and growth in the Refreshment Beverages segment are expected to drive results, the company faces headwinds from tariff and inflationary pressures, rising SG&A costs, and a struggling Coffee segment. Based on the Zacks model, KDP is not conclusively predicted to beat earnings this quarter due to a 0.00% Earnings ESP despite a Zacks Rank of 2.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Declares Dividend of $0.80 per Common Share
feed.summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company has announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share. This dividend is payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026. This declaration marks the 47th consecutive year of dividend increases for the company.

feed.title: Expanding our CCS operations in Louisiana with another project startup
feed.summary: ExxonMobil has announced the startup of its second active commercial carbon capture and storage (CCS) operation in Louisiana, the New Generation Gas Gathering (NG3) project. This project will capture up to 1.2 million metric tons of CO2 annually from a natural gas stream. This adds to their existing CCS operation with CF Industries and highlights Louisiana's role in low-carbon industrial solutions, supporting industries like LNG and attracting new investments like data centers.

feed.title: Genuine Parts Issues FY 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) has released its earnings guidance for fiscal year 2026, forecasting EPS between $7.50 and $8.00 and revenue of $25.0 billion to $25.6 billion. This guidance is below the current consensus EPS estimate of $8.41 but aligns with the revenue estimate. The outlook provides critical insight for investors into the company's expected performance and reflects broader trends in the automotive and industrial parts markets.

feed.title: Barclays Raises McKesson (MCK) Price Target to $1050 | MCK Stock News
feed.summary: Barclays has raised its price target for McKesson (MCK) to $1050, maintaining an "Overweight" rating, indicating a positive outlook for the company. This follows similar price target adjustments from other analysts like J.P. Morgan, Mizuho, Wells Fargo, and TD Cowen, signaling broad confidence in McKesson's performance and future prospects within the pharmaceutical wholesale industry. Despite these positive analyst forecasts, GuruFocus estimates a potential downside based on its GF Value fair value calculation.

feed.title: Stockholders Who Lost Money Investing in BlackRock TCP
feed.summary: Robbins LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. (TCPC) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between November 6, 2024, and January 23, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that BlackRock TCP misled investors by misstating its investments, portfolio restructuring efforts, and ultimately overstating its Net Asset Value (NAV). This came to light on January 23, 2026, when the company revealed a significant drop in its NAV, causing its stock price to fall.

feed.title: Kenvue Analysts Boost Their Forecasts After Upbeat Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Kenvue (NYSE: KVUE) reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates with 27 cents per share and $3.780 billion in sales. This upbeat performance led to a 2.4% rise in Kenvue shares and prompted analysts from UBS and Citigroup to raise their price targets for the stock. The company's CEO, Kirk Perry, attributed the success to disciplined execution and a favorable comparison to the previous year, with a focus on enhancing performance and completing the combination with Kimberly-Clark in 2026.

feed.title: Dollar Tree opens more stores in affluent ZIP codes as prices rise
feed.summary: Dollar Tree is increasingly opening new stores in more affluent ZIP codes, with half of its new locations since 2019 being in wealthier areas. This shift reflects a strategic move to attract higher-income shoppers, especially after the company began carrying items priced above $1. Despite attracting wealthier customers, Dollar Tree emphasizes that lower-income households remain a crucial part of its customer base.

feed.title: Michael Hakes' Top Picks: Nu Holdings, Thermo Fisher Scientific & Amazon.com
feed.summary: Michael Hakes, a senior portfolio manager at Murray Wealth Group, has revealed his top stock selections for investors to consider. His chosen picks include Nu Holdings, Thermo Fisher Scientific, and Amazon.com. This article highlights these companies as key stocks to watch in the current market.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Announces Quarterly Dividend Increase
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share, payable on March 13, 2026, marking its 47th consecutive year of dividend increases. This consistent dividend growth is expected to attract investors seeking stable income and reflects the company's strong financial health and commitment to shareholder returns. Wall Street analysts maintain an "Outperform" rating on SHW, forecasting a price increase and highlighting the company's positive outlook despite some near-term challenges.

feed.title: Merck Inks AI Drug Discovery Deal With Mayo Clinic To Revolutionize Drug Discovery
feed.summary: Merck (NYSE: MRK) has announced a strategic collaboration with Mayo Clinic to integrate AI and advanced analytics into drug discovery. This partnership aims to accelerate the development of personalized therapies by leveraging Mayo Clinic's extensive clinical data to validate AI models. The initial focus will be on therapeutic areas like inflammatory bowel disease, atopic dermatitis, and multiple sclerosis.

feed.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Republic Services Following Q4 Results
feed.summary: Republic Services (NYSE: RSG) reported weaker-than-expected Q4 sales and issued FY26 guidance below estimates. Despite beating EPS consensus, the company missed sales expectations and lowered its earnings and sales outlook for fiscal year 2026. Following these results, analysts from BMO Capital and Morgan Stanley cut their price targets on Republic Services stock.

feed.title: Morning Business Report: FAA orders merit-based pilot certification as Apple expands and Wendy’s closes stores
feed.summary: The FAA has mandated that U.S. airlines certify pilots based solely on merit, moving away from DEI initiatives, a decision supported by Sean Duffy for safety reasons. Concurrently, Apple is venturing into video podcasting to compete with existing platforms, and Wendy's plans to close approximately 350 U.S. locations while expanding its value menu to combat declining sales.

feed.title: Sysco sued over alleged unlawful tobacco surcharge in employee health plans
feed.summary: Sysco is facing a class action lawsuit for allegedly imposing unlawful and discriminatory tobacco surcharges on its employee health plans. Plaintiffs Julie Avalos and Randy Wolfe claim Sysco violated ERISA by charging a biweekly "tobacco surcharge" without providing a compliant wellness program that offers a reasonable alternative standard to avoid the fee. The lawsuit argues that this practice disproportionately impacts low-income workers and undermines ERISA's intent to protect employees from health-based discrimination.

feed.title: M&T BANK CORP SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corp has released its 2025 Form 10-K report, detailing a strong financial performance marked by increased net interest income, net income, and earnings per share. The report outlines the company's business operations, including its banking and wealth management services across multiple states and limited international activities, alongside strategic initiatives focused on loan portfolio quality, capital management, and future acquisitions. It also addresses significant challenges and risks such as market interest rate volatility, operational risks from cybersecurity threats, evolving regulatory environments, and emerging climate-related and geopolitical uncertainties.

feed.title: TRIP: B. Riley Securities Lowers Price Target for Tripadvisor |
feed.summary: B. Riley Securities has lowered its price target for Tripadvisor (TRIP) to $13.00 from $18.00, while maintaining a "Neutral" rating. This adjustment reflects a trend among several analysts who have recently revised their price targets downward for Tripadvisor. Despite these revisions, the average one-year target price from 15 analysts is $15.30, implying a 45.09% upside from its current price, and GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $21.85, suggesting a 107.21% upside.

feed.title: Exclusive - US refiners Phillips 66, Citgo seek to buy crude directly from Venezuela, sources say
feed.summary: U.S. refiners Phillips 66 and Citgo are reportedly seeking to purchase crude oil directly from Venezuela. This move comes as the U.S. has partially eased sanctions on Venezuela's oil industry. The potential direct purchases could impact global crude markets and U.S.-Venezuela relations.

feed.title: FDA Accepts BMY's NDA for Iberdomide Combo in Multiple Myeloma
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) announced that the FDA has accepted its new drug application (NDA) for iberdomide in combination with standard therapies for relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma (RRMM). The FDA granted priority review, with a decision expected by August 17, 2026, and also gave iberdomide Breakthrough Therapy designation for this indication. This proprietary drug, a novel CELMoD, aims to establish a new treatment foundation for multiple myeloma.

feed.title: Jim Cramer discusses over trading in Uber (UBER) stock
feed.summary: This article mentions that Jim Cramer discussed overtrading in Uber (UBER) stock. It implies that investors might be engaging in excessive buying or selling of UBER shares based on short-term factors rather than long-term fundamentals. Further details of Cramer's commentary are not provided in the snippet.

feed.title: NYC Pension Funds Sue AT&T Over Blocked Diversity Disclosure Proposal
feed.summary: Four New York City public pension funds have sued AT&T Inc. for unlawfully excluding a shareholder proposal that would require the telecommunications company to publicly disclose detailed workforce demographic data. The funds argue that AT&T violated federal securities law by refusing to include the proposal in its 2026 proxy materials, which seeks the public disclosure of its Consolidated EEO-1 Report, thereby depriving shareholders of a vote on a significant policy issue.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Posts Higher 2025 Profit, Launches $36 Billion Grid Investment Plan
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. reported increased GAAP earnings of $1.02 billion ($1.77 per share) and consolidated revenue of $15.1 billion for full-year 2025. The company also announced a new five-year capital investment program, "Energize365," totaling $36 billion from 2026 through 2030, which includes over $19 billion for transmission investments. FirstEnergy expects this plan to drive a 10% compounded annual growth rate through 2030 and affirmed a core earnings guidance range of $2.62 to $2.82 per share for fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: Stop buying your Ryobi tools from Home Depot, here's where to buy instead
feed.summary: The article suggests that consumers looking for Ryobi tools can find better deals and often better quality at Direct Tools Outlet (DTO) rather than Home Depot. DTO, owned by Ryobi's parent company TTI, specializes in selling refurbished or used tools that undergo rigorous testing and often come with a generous warranty. While Home Depot only sells new or clearance items, DTO provides a cost-effective alternative for budget-conscious buyers, whether through their physical stores or online shop.

feed.title: C-suite changes continue at Charles River with new CFO, legal chief
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories is undergoing significant leadership changes, appointing a new CFO and legal chief amidst declining revenue and pressure from an activist shareholder. Longtime CEO Jim Foster is also set to retire after three decades with the company. These changes come as the company seeks to address its financial performance and shareholder concerns.

feed.title: Vishay Intertechnology, Inc. Introduces New Series of AEC-Q200 Qualified Thick Film Chip Resistors in the Ultra Compact 0201 Case Size
feed.summary: Vishay Intertechnology has launched a new series of AEC-Q200 qualified thick film chip resistors, the CRCW0201-AT e3, in the ultra-compact 0201 case size. These resistors offer a small footprint, reduced PCB requirements by 50% compared to 0402 case sizes, and are designed for automotive, industrial, and telecommunications applications. Despite their small size, they deliver a power rating of 0.05W and operate across a wide temperature range with various resistance values.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Linked Broadcom (AVGO) & Computer Storage Stocks
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed Broadcom (AVGO) in relation to computer storage stocks like Micron, Western Digital, Seagate, and Sandisk. He suggested that if these "shortage stocks" decline, Broadcom, NVIDIA, and AMD would rally. Broadcom's stock is up 42% over the past year but down 6.5% YTD, with analysts offering mixed ratings and price targets.

feed.title: RXT stock: Rackspace Technology (NASDAQ) $1.58 intraday Feb 18 2026: Palantir tie-up boosts outlook
feed.summary: Rackspace Technology (RXT) stock surged to $1.58 intraday on February 18, 2026, driven by a new strategic partnership with Palantir, which aims to boost managed AI and sovereign cloud deals. Despite a significant volume spike and short-term bullish sentiment, the company faces mixed fundamentals, including substantial net debt and negative operating margins. While Meyka AI rates RXT a B+ and suggests a BUY, its one-year forecast projects an 81.03% downside, highlighting the divergence between short-term event-driven trading and longer-term model projections.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Discusses Salesforce (CRM) Stock
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) stock, highlighting a comparison with Walmart regarding cash flow and growth rates. While Salesforce's shares have seen a significant decline, Stifel reiterated a Buy rating, citing the potential of its Agentforce platform in the AI era. Piper Sandler, however, cut its price target on the stock.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Admits He Got Emerson (EMR) Wrong
feed.summary: Jim Cramer admitted he was wrong about Emerson Electric Co. (EMR), acknowledging that the company's acquisitions, particularly with National Instruments, turned out to be successful. He noted Emerson's role in "secret data center plays" due to its electricity-related products, similar to Eaton, and their effective use of software to boost numbers. JPMorgan and Evercore ISI have also expressed positive outlooks on EMR, with Evercore initiating coverage with an Outperform rating and a $170 price target, citing growth in portfolio quality through strategic initiatives.
